reviews.review_description: No instructions, no tutorial, joystick steers in opposite direction that you want to go. If you are stuck on rock, no way to get off. Have to quit game and reload.

Do not buy this “game”, it’s is absolutely horrible. Don’t give this “game” a chance. No tutorial, and the controls dont make sense, you can get stuck or fly off of the map very often, and when you do you have to rejoin. It’s not fun whatsoever. I would rather go to school than play this horrid“game”. It’s a scam. It’s not worth $5, infact, you should be payed to play this “game”. I hate the developers for making me waste money and making me waste 5 minutes of my life. I played this “game” for 5 minutes, and I instantly regretted it. I gave it a chance. Trust me, don’t get this “game”. I’m warning you. I was gonna cuss in my review, but it’s not allowed. Lucky developers
Very simply - it doesn’t work and is horrible. Don’t buy.
You need to squat while thrusting arms to mimic skiing motions.  You steer by tilting your body side to side.  Decent exercise if you want variety from the standard fitness apps.
Poor controls, very hard to maneuver and not worth playing.
